statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn DFCI WPBT setting reference
links.summary: Microsoft documents WPBT as a UEFI or DFCI managed feature with Not configured, Enabled, and Disabled states.

links.title: Repo security notes for WPBT
links.summary: The repo security notes track DisableWpbtExecution under Session Manager as the current implementation surface and cite community hardening references for the mapping.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\DisableWpbtExecution = 1 for the WPBT tweak.

links.title: nohuto regkit trace for Session Manager
links.summary: The raw registry traces list \Registry\Machine\SYSTEM\ControlSet001\Control\Session Manager : DisableWpbtExecution, corroborating the observed Session Manager path.
